proof_limits: This analysis reads only static evidence files from persisted building ledgers; it does not observe provider runtime, process liveness, or network state
All raw_refs are from adapter-recorded observation — support evidence only; not source truth
agent_fact_created: false on all adapter errors means no AgentFact was produced; agent return values are not available for inspection
message_excerpt fields contain partial error messages only; full exception bodies are scrubbed

Operator notes (fleet preset stall, notify-v3 timeout, small-probe speed, late-night provider degradation) are appendix context — not ledger evidence and not used for axis attribution in this analysis

All axis attributions are evidence-grounded candidates supported by error_kind, exception_type, message_excerpt, and declared write_scope — they are not verdicts; disposition authority belongs to caller/COO
This analysis does not claim source truth, does not judge success or quality, does not choose Link Movement
